ddls:
CREATE TABLE "eras" (
  "era_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each era */,
  "era_name" TEXT /* Name of the era */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the era */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the era */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("era_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_classes" (
  "unit_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit class */,
  "unit_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit class */,
  "movement_range" INTEGER /* Movement range of the unit class */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the unit class */,
  "defense_power" INTEGER /* Defense power of the unit class */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health of the unit class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "movement_range" INTEGER /* Movement range of the unit */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the unit */,
  "defense_power" INTEGER /* Defense power of the unit */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_class_id") REFERENCES unit_classes ("unit_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology that unlocks the building */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the building */,
  "production_bonus" INTEGER /* Production bonus provided by the building */,
  "gold_bonus" INTEGER /* Gold bonus provided by the building */,
  "science_bonus" INTEGER /* Science bonus provided by the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus */,
  "bonus_name" TEXT /* Name of the bonus */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology that provides the bonus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of the bonus */,
  "bonus_value" INTEGER /* Value of the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diplomacy" (
  "diplomacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diplomatic effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the diplomatic effect */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology that has the effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diplomatic effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of the diplomatic effect */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the diplomatic effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diplomacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade effect */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade effect */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology that has the effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade effect */,
  "effect_value" INTEGER /* Value of the trade effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_visuals" (
  "audio_visual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio visual element */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "icon_atlas" TEXT /* Icon atlas for the technology */,
  "audio_intro" TEXT /* Audio intro for the technology */,
  "audio_intro_header" TEXT /* Audio intro header for the technology */,
  "animation" TEXT /* Animation associated with the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_visual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "quote" TEXT /* Quote associated with the technology */,
  "speaker" TEXT /* Speaker of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "prerequisite_tech" INTEGER /* Prerequisite technology */,
  "prerequisite_building" INTEGER /* Prerequisite building */,
  "prerequisite_unit" INTEGER /* Prerequisite unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_building FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_building") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_unit FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unlocks" (
  "unlock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unlock */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "unlock_building" INTEGER /* Building unlocked by the technology */,
  "unlock_unit" INTEGER /* Unit unlocked by the technology */,
  "unlock_feature" INTEGER /* Feature unlocked by the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unlock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unlocks_unlock_feature FOREIGN KEY ("unlock_feature") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unlocks_unlock_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unlock_unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unlocks_unlock_building FOREIGN KEY ("unlock_building") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "movement_cost" INTEGER /* Movement cost of the feature */,
  "combat_modifier" INTEGER /* Combat modifier of the feature */,
  "healing_rate" INTEGER /* Healing rate of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ai_behaviors" (
  "ai_behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AI behavior */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of AI behavior */,
  "behavior_value" INTEGER /* Value of AI behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ai_behavior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_tree" (
  "tech_tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology tree entry */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology */,
  "parent_tech_id" INTEGER /* Parent technology */,
  "child_tech_id" INTEGER /* Child technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_tree_id")
)
